name: mint cilantro lentils
instructions: 1 tbsp vegetable oil (recipe says 3, 1 is enough). 1/2 tsp cumin seeds, 1/2 tsp mustard seeds, pinch asafetida (optional), 1-3 whole dried red chiles. 1 small (4 oz) yellow onion in fine half rings, 2 cloves garlic chopped, 1 medium tomato chopped. 1 cup whole green lentils. 3/4 tsp salt. 1 tsp ground coriander. finish with 1/2 cup chopped fresh cilantro and 1/2 cup chopped fresh mint.
